sessionNote: As this is your first session, all muscle groups are fully recovered, allowing you to focus on form and technique. Keep rest periods short to maintain elevated heart rate for maximum calorie burn.
dayCoachTip: Focus on controlled movements to ensure proper form and maximize fat loss.

cardioSuggestion.reason: A brisk walk helps maintain an elevated heart rate to support your fat loss goal.
